# Debrief: BetaHealth — Senior Product Designer — Final on-site — 2026-04-20

## What Landed
- Architecture+CS framing landed well with VP Design
- Award pedigree mention got nods

## What Fumbled
- **How would you frame this in business terms?** — my opening was craft-led; lost the room early
- **What's your competitive analysis?** — couldn't speak specifically to direct competitors

## Interviewer Signals
- **Sara Kim** (VP Design): Neutral → noted "we'd want stronger business framing"
- **Ben Rao** (Lead PD): Positive → liked the design craft details
- **Taylor Wong** (Staff PM): Neutral → wanted product strategy depth

## Comp / Timeline / Process
- Said decision in one week

## Gut-Feel Verdict
6/10 — close but business framing was the soft spot

## Verdict
Lost (neck and neck) — competitive loss, no clear gap

#business-framing #competitive-analysis
